old_thesis: Stock down 30% year-to-date in 2026 due to deceleration to 8.7% revenue growth, mounting competitive and regulatory pressures. The debt-funded buyback adds financial risk.
new_thesis: Analysts see a 30% rebound potential in 2026, driven by strong fundamentals, AI/agentic platforms like Agentforce, and record $25 billion debt-funded buyback. Revenue growth of 10% in FY2026 and raised FY30 target to $63B support long-term optimism.
what_changed: 最近一季度（2026-04-30）EPS超预期24.0%；管理层给出3条前瞻指引，显示业务走向；公司类型已确认为GrowthSoftware，估值方法已切换至Forward PE + PEG + EV/FCF
why_now: 股价仍低于分析师共识目标价33.7%，下次财报（2026-09-02）是预期差验证的关键节点。
